items.subject: Introducing the Child Safety Blueprint
items.body: Discover OpenAI’s Child Safety Blueprint—a roadmap for building AI responsibly with safeguards, age-appropriate design, and collaboration to protect and empower young people online.

items.subject: Sam Altman says AI superintelligence is so big that we need a ‘New Deal’—critics say OpenAI’s policy ideas are a cover for ‘regulatory nihilism’
items.body: OpenAI’s sweeping vision for the AI economy spans everything from public wealth funds to shorter workweeks—but critics say it raises familiar ideas without offering a clear path to action.

summary:
Here are 4-6 bullet points summarizing OpenAI-related developments with insight:

• **Introducing the Child Safety Blueprint**: OpenAI has released a roadmap for building AI responsibly, focusing on safeguards, age-appropriate design, and collaboration to protect and empower young people online. This move aims to address concerns around AI safety and child protection.

• **Criticism of Sam Altman's "New Deal" proposal**: Fortune published an article that criticizes OpenAI's recent policy ideas as a cover for "regulatory nihilism," suggesting that the proposals lack a clear path to action and only raise familiar ideas.

• **OpenAI Safety Fellowship**: OpenAI has launched a pilot program to support independent safety and alignment research, aiming to develop the next generation of talent in AI safety and alignment.

• **Acquisition of TBPN**: OpenAI has acquired TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.

• **Flexible pricing for Codex**: OpenAI has introduced pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams with a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.

Trend:
**Increased focus on AI safety and responsibility**: OpenAI is emphasizing its commitment to ensuring the safe and responsible development of AI, as seen in the release of the Child Safety Blueprint, the OpenAI Safety Fellowship, and other initiatives. This trend highlights the growing recognition of the importance of AI safety and responsibility in the industry.
